summary: Frontend-only dashboard regression checks completed on public preview URL. Requested card replacement behavior is working: old Hedef/Günlük tempo cards are removed, profile-driven meta card renders from grade_level + study_field, and card hides cleanly when both are empty.
critical_code_review_comments: Dashboard page file size is high (frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.js ~990 lines). Per maintainability guideline (>700), split into focused sections/components.
test_credentials: Read /app/memory/test_credentials.md. Dev auth bypass user observed: test@izlek.dev.
seed_data_creation: No new seeded entities created. Existing profile fields were updated during UI validation and reset to empty at end.
context_for_next_testing_agent: One early broad text selector produced a false positive on 'Hedef' because welcome copy includes 'hedefin'; exact-match check confirms legacy card labels are absent. Final state left with both grade_level and study_field empty, and dashboard meta card hidden.
rca of the issue: No functional regression reproduced for requested scope.
